name: Kunal Kulthe
tagline: I design and build reliable, scalable software — turning complex problems into clean, intuitive products people love to use.
about:
I'm a software engineer with a passion for building products end-to-end — from data pipelines and APIs to polished front-end experiences. I care deeply about clean architecture, performance, and writing code that other people enjoy working with. When I'm not shipping features, I'm exploring new technologies and sharpening my craft.

(Replace this paragraph with your own story — what you do, what drives you, and what you're looking for.)

experience.summary: Building and maintaining production software across the stack.
highlights: Designed and shipped key features used by internal teams, improving workflow efficiency.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable, well-tested releases.
Optimized critical paths to reduce latency and improve user experience.

experience.summary: Contributed to web applications and internal tooling.
highlights: Built reusable UI components and automated repetitive tasks.
Wrote unit and integration tests to improve code coverage.

education.description: Coursework in data structures, algorithms, databases, and software engineering.
